root.sql: select * from (select a.*,rowNum m_rowNum from ( select to_char(tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.first_result, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w1, case when #sum_level#=1 then to_char(tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.first_result+1,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') when #sum_level#=3 then to_char(add_months(tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.first_result,1),'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') when #sum_level#=2 then to_char(tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.first_result+7,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') else '' end w1_2, tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.ne_name w2, tia_alarm_dict1.txt w3, vendor_name.zh_name w4, tia_alarm_dict2.txt w5, tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.unstandard_alarm_num w6, tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.ne_id ne_id, tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.eqp_object_class eqp_object_class, tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.network_type_top network_type_top, tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.vendor_id vendor_id from nmosdb.tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum left join (select id,txt from nmosdb.tia_alarm_dict where type =1317) tia_alarm_dict1 on tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.network_type_top=tia_alarm_dict1.id left join (select id,txt from nmosdb.tia_alarm_dict where type =9) tia_alarm_dict2 on tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.eqp_object_class=tia_alarm_dict2.id left join vendor_name vendor_name on tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.vendor_id=vendor_name.type where tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.first_result >=to_date('#time1#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.first_result <=to_date('#time2#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.sum_level=#sum_level# and tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.vendor_id in (#vendor#) and tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.eqp_object_class in (#eqp_obj#) and tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.ne_id in (#areaID#) and tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.ne_type =10000 order by tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.first_result,tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.ne_name,vendor_name.zh_name,tia_alarm_dict2.txt,tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.unstandard_alarm_num desc )a ) Where m_rowNum > #BegeinIndex# and m_rowNum <= #EndIndex#
root.countsql: select count(*) from ( select to_char(tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.first_result, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w1, case when #sum_level#=1 then to_char(tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.first_result+1,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') when #sum_level#=3 then to_char(add_months(tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.first_result,1),'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') when #sum_level#=2 then to_char(tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.first_result+7,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') else '' end w1_2, tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.ne_name w2, tia_alarm_dict1.txt w3, vendor_name.zh_name w4, tia_alarm_dict2.txt w5, tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.unstandard_alarm_num w6, tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.ne_id ne_id, tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.eqp_object_class eqp_object_class, tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.network_type_top network_type_top, tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.vendor_id vendor_id from nmosdb.tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum left join (select id,txt from nmosdb.tia_alarm_dict where type =1317) tia_alarm_dict1 on tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.network_type_top=tia_alarm_dict1.id left join (select id,txt from nmosdb.tia_alarm_dict where type =9) tia_alarm_dict2 on tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.eqp_object_class=tia_alarm_dict2.id left join vendor_name vendor_name on tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.vendor_id=vendor_name.type where tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.first_result >=to_date('#time1#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.first_result <=to_date('#time2#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.sum_level=#sum_level# and tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.vendor_id in (#vendor#) and tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.eqp_object_class in (#eqp_obj#) and tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.ne_id in (#areaID#) and tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.ne_type =10000 order by tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.first_result,tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.ne_name,vendor_name.zh_name,tia_alarm_dict2.txt,tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_sum.unstandard_alarm_num desc )

Conditions.Condition: select distinct province_name as text,province_id as value from region_city_local union all select 'Unknown' as text,99999999 as value from dual order by text asc
select distinct zh_name as text,type as value from vendor_name
select distinct txt as text,id as value from tia_alarm_dict where type =9 and valid = 1

root.detailSql:
select * from (select a.*,rowNum m_rowNum from ( select tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.province_name w1, vendor_name.zh_name w2, tia_alarm_dict2.txt w3, tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.ne_label w4, tia_alarm_dict3.txt w5, tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.eqp_label w6, tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_title_text w7, tia_alarm_dict4.txt w8, to_char(tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.event_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w9, to_char(tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.cancel_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w10, tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text0||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text1||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text2||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text3||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text4||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text5||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text6||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text7||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text8||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text9||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text10||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text11||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text12||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text13||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text14||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text15 w12 from tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 9) tia_alarm_dict2 on tia_alarm_dict2.id = tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.object_class left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 9) tia_alarm_dict3 on tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.eqp_object_class =tia_alarm_dict3.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 6) tia_alarm_dict4 on tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.org_severity = tia_alarm_dict4.id left join vendor_name vendor_name on tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.vendor_id = vendor_name.type where tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.first_result >= to_date('@w1@','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.first_result < to_date('@w1_2@','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.province_id =@ne_id@ and tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.eqp_object_class =@eqp_object_class@ and tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.vendor_id = @vendor_id@ {0} order by tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.event_time
)a ) Where m_rowNum > #BegeinIndex# and m_rowNum <= #EndIndex#
root.detailCountSql: select count(*) from ( select tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.province_name w1, vendor_name.zh_name w2, tia_alarm_dict2.txt w3, tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.ne_label w4, tia_alarm_dict3.txt w5, tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.eqp_label w6, tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_title_text w7, tia_alarm_dict4.txt w8, to_char(tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.event_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w9, to_char(tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.cancel_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w10, tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text0||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text1||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text2||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text3||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text4||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text5||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text6||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text7||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text8||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text9||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text10||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text11||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text12||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text13||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text14||tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.alarm_text15 w12 from tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 9) tia_alarm_dict2 on tia_alarm_dict2.id = tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.object_class left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 9) tia_alarm_dict3 on tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.eqp_object_class =tia_alarm_dict3.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 6) tia_alarm_dict4 on tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.org_severity = tia_alarm_dict4.id left join vendor_name vendor_name on tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.vendor_id = vendor_name.type where tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.first_result >= to_date('@w1@','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.first_result < to_date('@w1_2@','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.province_id =@ne_id@ and tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.eqp_object_class =@eqp_object_class@ and tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.vendor_id = @vendor_id@ {0} order by tpa_alarm_unstandard_tc_detail.event_time )
